{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/anthropic-vacancies/profile-mapping/01-initial-analysis/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. 01-initial-analysis

_Файлов:_ 8

h2. Содержание

* [01-profile-five-layers.md|01-profile-five-layers.md] — 
* [02-primary-fde.md|02-primary-fde.md] — > [!TIP]
* [03-secondary-beneficial-deployments.md|03-secondary-beneficial-deployments.md] — 
* [04-tertiary-research-engineer-agents.md|04-tertiary-research-engineer-agents.md] — 
* [05-quaternary-developer-education.md|05-quaternary-developer-education.md] — 
* [06-not-applicable-roles.md|06-not-applicable-roles.md] — 
* [07-unique-niche-eu-legal-infra.md|07-unique-niche-eu-legal-infra.md] — 
* [08-practical-ranking.md|08-practical-ranking.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [05-quaternary-developer-education|docs/anthropic-vacancies/profile-mapping/01-initial-analysis/05-quaternary-developer-education.md] (сходство 0.18)
